## Type
<!-- Check one -->
- [ ] feat тАФ new functionality
- [ ] fix тАФ bug fix
- [ ] refactor тАФ code change without behavior change
- [ ] chore тАФ deps, config, CI
- [ ] docs тАФ documentation only
- [ ] test тАФ test only

## Checklist
- [ ] Target branch is `dev` (not `main`)
- [ ] `make check` passes (lint + typecheck + arch + test)
- [ ] No magic numbers тАФ uses `settings.*` or `constants.py`
- [ ] New tools have `title`, `tags`, `annotations`, `icons`, `meta`
